before_state.notes: No saved before-state is available for this Salesforce write. Apply may proceed only after explicit no-snapshot approval, and the receipt must record the recovery limit.

verification_plan.notes: Review the dry-run plan only. Apply requires explicit no-snapshot approval before Salesforce HTTP when no saved snapshot is available.

rollback.notes: No automatic rollback is available in this CLI. It does not create snapshots, backups, or a generated rollback plan.

recovery.restore_note: No automatic rollback, snapshots, or backups are created. If a restore action is available, run a separate explicit restore command as its own command.
